thesis: Agenty is both the agency for agents and the reusable framework used to build them.
outcomes: Create a durable home for cross-project agent engineering standards.
Ship a live-coding/vibe-coding starter for many kinds of agent applications.
Continuously improve from evidence gathered across active agent products.
Support an open-source framework and a high-ticket agent-building service.
constraints: Use existing best practices and provenance.
Produce a real verifiable goal and iterate against it.
Keep shared skills, You.md data, and product-specific logic with their canonical owners.
Do not treat agenty.io purchase as an implementation dependency.
